# Code Anchors: Overlay Coordination

- `apps/prime/app/layout/overlay.tsx` — the shared open-surface state: derives the terminal recede, carries the stage-advance offer, and the `submitCommand` action a user submission writes through.
- `apps/prime/app/advance/advance-bar.tsx` — the stage-advance affordance, reading the shared state to stay hidden while a surface is up.
